Euphronios

1 work in the gallery.
Click any image to enlarge. Use ← → or close with Esc.
Euphronios Krater
by Euphronios
Archaic Greek · Euphronios &amp; Euxitheos · c. 515 BCE
A red-figure calyx-krater showing Hypnos and Thanatos carrying Sarpedon's body. Looted from an Etruscan tomb; caught up in a 30-year dispute; finally returned to Italy in 2008.
←Kim Eung-won Caesar van Everdingen→
